calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Off Calendar

Defualt Prove-Up Hrg; App And Statement Of Case
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Julian T. Lastowski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.,

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CORA E. ALTAMIRANO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Beverly Decaro sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Court entered judgment Quieting Title to Real Property in favor of Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., and against Defendant CORA E. ALTAMIRANO, only.
